arts.ttl: “That’s just the truth” – Erik ten Hag slammed for the one thing he’s never had at Man United
arts.sum: If there’s one thing that managers need from their players it’s total buy in to their methods, and Erik ten Hag doesn’t ever appear to have had that at Man United.
